product_overview: AI Headshot Generator is a web app for creating and editing images with AI-powered tools. Users can remove or replace backgrounds, generate images from text, and manage app settings for Hugging Face integration.
core_goals: Remove image backgrounds and save the transparent result
Replace an image background using a text prompt
Configure Hugging Face API settings and model parameters from the admin panel

features.name: Remove Background
features.description: Upload an image and generate a version with the background removed, then download the edited file.
user_flows: Navigate to /tools/remove-background -> Upload an image file -> Remove the background -> View the original and processed images side-by-side -> Download the result

features.name: Replace Background
features.description: Upload an image, describe a new background, and generate a composited image with the new scene.
user_flows: Navigate to /tools/replace-background -> Upload an image file -> Enter a text prompt -> Replace the background -> View the original and processed images side-by-side -> Download the result

features.name: Text to Image
features.description: Create a new image from a written prompt and download the generated output.
user_flows: Navigate to /tools/text-to-image -> Enter a text prompt -> Generate an image -> View the generated image -> Download the result

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Update the application's Hugging Face API key and model inference settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Enter a Hugging Face API key -> Adjust model settings and inference steps -> Save the settings -> See a success notification

routes.description: Home page listing all AI tools
Tool to remove background from images
Tool to replace background of images
Tool to generate images from text
Tool to reimagine images based on prompts
Tool to cleanup and inpaint images
Admin panel to manage settings and Hugging Face API key

features.name: Remove Background
features.description: Upload an image to remove its background and download the result
user_interactions: View original and processed images side-by-side
Click Download button to save result

features.name: Replace Background
features.description: Upload an image and provide a text prompt to replace its background
user_interactions: Enter text prompt in input field
View original and processed images side-by-side

features.name: Text to Image
features.description: Generate an image from a text prompt

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Manage application settings and Hugging Face API configuration
user_interactions: Enter Hugging Face API Key in input field
Modify model settings and inference steps

known_limitations.issue: APIs depend on Hugging Face and may fail with fetch failed on local Egyptian networks
known_limitations.impact: Tests might fail locally if running outside of VPN
